title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Rising Conflict
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Blackbeard, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #19 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're Gettin' Outta here, you idiots!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We can't take whitebeard's head anymore!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: White- Beard was truly his great rival!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Hang in there!!! You have to live!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You have to... hang in there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Won't you idiots just give up already?
